# pheno-runtime-config

> Hot-reloadable runtime configuration for the pheno-* fleet (L37).

## What
`pheno-runtime-config` provides a `Reloadable<T>` trait + two backends
(file watcher via notify v6, and SIGHUP fallback) for configuration values
that can be swapped at runtime without restarting the process.

## Key types
- `Reloadable<T>` — trait with `reload()`, `current()`, `watch()`
- `ArcReloadable<T>` — default impl using ArcSwap + tokio::sync::watch
- `FileConfig<T>` — file-backed with notify v6 watcher
- `ReloadError` — typed error enum

## Design
Lock-free reads (arc-swap), async fan-out (tokio watch), two backends.
Not a reimplementation of Configra — Configra handles static config loading,
this handles hot-swappable runtime values (different lifecycle, different
uses: benchmark config, feature flags, rate limits, experimental params).

## See also
- ADR-095: https://github.com/KooshaPari/pheno-docs/adr/095
- Configra (static config): https://github.com/KooshaPari/Configra
